security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; media-src 'self' blob:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; worker-src 'self' blob:

bundle.shortDescription: Native macOS Mission Control for large Codex engineering goals.
bundle.longDescription: SwarmZ turns large backlogs into durable Missions with dependency-aware scheduling, fresh task-bound Codex workers, isolated git worktrees, reproducible quality evidence, recovery and an Integration Train. One fixed project Orchestrator coordinates and learns; workers have no reusable persona or memory. Runtime Environments, GitHub issue and PR flows, reminders, candidate batches and multi-root work remain bounded by explicit human-approved policy. App state stays on your Mac; model traffic uses your Codex CLI sign-in and optional GitHub operations use your local gh CLI.
